item.description:
# LocaRec 0.4.0
### Fixed
- System audio was never recorded. A recording set to "System" or "Both" saved only the microphone, with nothing from calls or other apps and no warning that anything was missing. It now captures system audio correctly, so those recordings include what was playing on your Mac.
### Changed
- When system audio cannot be captured, the app now warns you after you stop recording instead of silently saving an empty track.
Build: 46 Commit: 6d22a51
